description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline using the docker:latest image with a docker:dind service and a before_script that runs docker info and logs in to $CI_REGISTRY with $CI_JOB_TOKEN. Define three stages: build, test, and release. Add build_centos6 and build_centos7 jobs in the build stage (except master) that set DISTRO and TAG variables and execute "docker build --pull -t $CONTAINER_TEST_IMAGE:$TAG -f Dockerfile.$DISTRO ." then "docker push $CONTAINER_TEST_IMAGE:$TAG". Add test_centos6 and test_centos7 jobs in the test stage (except master) that set DISTRO, INIT and TAG variables and run "docker pull $CONTAINER_TEST_IMAGE:$TAG", "docker run --name $CONTAINER_ID -d --privileged -v /sys/fs/cgroup:/sys/fs/cgroup:ro $CONTAINER_TEST_IMAGE:$TAG $INIT", "docker exec --tty $CONTAINER_ID env TERM=xterm ansible --version", and "docker rm -f $CONTAINER_ID". Add release-image_centos6, release-image_centos7, and release-image_latest jobs in the release stage (only master) that set RELEASE_TAG and TAG variables and run "docker pull $CONTAINER_DEV_IMAGE:$TAG", "docker tag $CONTAINER_DEV_IMAGE:$TAG $CONTAINER_RELEASE_IMAGE:$RELEASE_TAG", and "docker push $CONTAINER_RELEASE_IMAGE:$RELEASE_TAG", using the variables CONTAINER_DEV_IMAGE, CONTAINER_ID, CONTAINER_RELEASE_IMAGE, and CONTAINER_TEST_IMAGE throughout.
